comprehensive.en: The teacher gave a comprehensive review.

compute.en: The machine can compute large numbers fast.
compute.zh: 這台機器能快速計算龐大的數字。

computerize.zh: 圖書館把紀錄電腦化了。

comrade.en: The soldiers stood by their comrades.
comrade.zh: 士兵們和他們的同袍站在一起。

concession.en: Both sides made a concession to agree.
concession.zh: 雙方各退一步才達成協議。

concise.en: Her report was clear and concise.

condense.en: Steam condenses into water on a cold window.
condense.zh: 蒸氣在冷窗戶上凝結成水。

confederation.zh: 幾個州加入了這個聯邦。

congressman-congresswoman.en: The congressman voted for the new law.
congressman-congresswoman.zh: 這位國會議員投票贊成新法律。

conquest.en: The history book describes the conquest.
conquest.zh: 這本歷史書描述了那場征服。

conscientious.en: She is a conscientious and careful worker.
conscientious.zh: 她是個盡責又細心的員工。

conserve.en: We should conserve energy at home.
conserve.zh: 我們在家應該節約能源。

consolation.en: Her kind words were a consolation to me.
consolation.zh: 她親切的話對我是種安慰。

console.en: She tried to console the crying child.
console.zh: 她試著安慰那個哭泣的孩子。

conspiracy.en: The book is about a secret conspiracy.
conspiracy.zh: 這本書是關於一個秘密的陰謀。

contention.en: The price was a point of contention.

contestant.zh: 每位參賽者回答了三個問題。

continuity.en: The show kept a sense of continuity.

contradict.zh: 他的行為和他說的話互相矛盾。

convene.en: The committee will convene next week.

coral.en: Colorful fish swim around the coral.
coral.zh: 色彩繽紛的魚在珊瑚四周游動。

correspondence.en: They kept up a long correspondence by letter.

cosmetic.en: The change was only cosmetic, not real.
cosmetic.zh: 這個改變只是表面的，並非實質。

cosmetics.en: She sells cosmetics at the store.

counterpart.en: Our manager met her counterpart abroad.
counterpart.zh: 我們的經理會見了她在海外的對等人士。

coupon.en: I used a coupon to get a discount.
coupon.zh: 我用優惠券獲得了折扣。

courtyard.en: Children played in the school courtyard.
courtyard.zh: 孩子們在學校的中庭玩。

cowardly.en: Running away was a cowardly thing to do.

cozy.en: The small cabin was warm and cozy.
cozy.zh: 那間小木屋既溫暖又舒適。

crackdown.en: There was a crackdown on speeding.

cracker.en: She had cheese on a cracker.

cram.en: He crammed for the test all night.
cram.zh: 他熬夜為考試臨時抱佛腳。

cramp.en: She got a cramp in her leg while swimming.

crater.en: The volcano has a deep crater.
crater.zh: 這座火山有個深深的火山口。

credible.zh: 她給了一個可信的解釋。

crocodile.en: A crocodile lay still by the river.
crocodile.zh: 一隻鱷魚靜靜地躺在河邊。

crossing.en: Wait for the green light at the crossing.

crutch.en: He walked with crutches after the injury.
crutch.zh: 受傷後他拄著拐杖走路。

cub.en: The lion cub played near its mother.

cucumber.en: She sliced a cucumber for the salad.
cucumber.zh: 她切了根黃瓜放進沙拉。

cultivate.en: Farmers cultivate rice in these fields.

cumulative.en: The cumulative effect of practice is great.

curb.en: We must curb our spending this month.
curb.zh: 這個月我們必須控制開銷。

curfew.en: Her parents set a ten o'clock curfew.
curfew.zh: 她父母規定她十點前要回家。

curry.en: We had spicy curry for dinner.

customary.en: It is customary to bow as a greeting.

cynical.en: He has a cynical view of politics.
cynical.zh: 他對政治抱持憤世嫉俗的看法。

dazzle.en: The bright lights dazzled the driver.
dazzle.zh: 刺眼的燈光讓駕駛目眩。

deafen.en: The loud music almost deafened us.
deafen.zh: 震耳的音樂差點把我們震聾。

decisive.en: Her decisive action saved the day.
decisive.zh: 她果斷的行動解決了危機。

dedication.en: Her dedication to teaching is clear.
dedication.zh: 她對教學的奉獻顯而易見。

deduct.en: They deducted the cost from his pay.
deduct.zh: 他們從他的薪水扣除了這筆費用。

deem.en: The plan was deemed too risky.
deem.zh: 這個計畫被認為太冒險。

default.en: The phone uses English as the default.
default.zh: 這支手機預設使用英文。

defect.en: The toy had a small defect.

defiance.en: He crossed his arms in defiance.

definitive.en: This is the definitive answer to the question.
definitive.zh: 這是這個問題的最終答案。

deplete.en: Overfishing can deplete the ocean's fish.
deplete.zh: 過度捕撈會耗盡海洋的魚。

deprive.en: Lack of sleep can deprive you of energy.
deprive.zh: 睡眠不足會剝奪你的精力。

despise.en: He despises cheating of any kind.
despise.zh: 他鄙視任何形式的作弊。

destined.en: She felt destined to become a doctor.
destined.zh: 她覺得自己注定要當醫生。

detach.en: Detach the coupon along the line.

detain.en: The police detained the suspect for questioning.
detain.zh: 警方拘留了嫌犯以便偵訊。

detention.en: He got detention for being late again.

deter.zh: 明亮的燈光能嚇阻小偷。

detergent.en: Add some detergent to wash the clothes.

devour.en: The hungry dog devoured its food.
devour.zh: 那隻餓壞的狗狼吞虎嚥地吃完了食物。

diabetes.en: He controls his diabetes with diet.

dictate.en: The teacher dictated a short paragraph.
dictate.zh: 老師唸了一小段讓我們聽寫。

dictation.en: We had a spelling dictation today.
dictation.zh: 我們今天做了拼字聽寫。

dictator.en: The cruel dictator ruled by fear.
dictator.zh: 那個殘忍的獨裁者靠恐懼統治。

dictatorship.en: The country was under a dictatorship.
dictatorship.zh: 這個國家處於獨裁統治之下。

differentiate.en: It is hard to differentiate the twins.

diplomacy.en: The crisis was solved through diplomacy.
diplomacy.zh: 這場危機透過外交手段解決了。

directive.en: The boss issued a clear directive.
directive.zh: 老闆下達了明確的指示。

disable.en: Please disable the alarm before you enter.

disastrous.en: The plan had a disastrous result.
disastrous.zh: 這個計畫帶來了災難性的結果。

disbelief.en: She stared at the news in disbelief.
disbelief.zh: 她難以置信地盯著那則新聞。

discard.zh: 請丟掉那個破掉的杯子。

discharge.en: The patient was discharged from the hospital.

disciple.en: The wise teacher had many disciples.

disclosure.en: The disclosure of the plan surprised us.
disclosure.zh: 計畫的揭露讓我們驚訝。

discomfort.en: He felt some discomfort after the meal.
discomfort.zh: 飯後他覺得有點不舒服。

discreet.en: She was discreet about the surprise party.
discreet.zh: 她對驚喜派對守口如瓶。

disgrace.en: Cheating brought disgrace to the team.

dismay.en: To our dismay, the trip was cancelled.
dismay.zh: 令我們沮喪的是，旅行被取消了。

dispensable.zh: 這些多餘的東西是可有可無的。

disposal.en: Proper trash disposal keeps the city clean.
disposal.zh: 妥善的垃圾處理讓城市保持乾淨。

dispose.en: Please dispose of the trash properly.

dissent.en: There was some dissent about the plan.
dissent.zh: 對於這個計畫有一些異議。

distraction.en: Turn off the TV to avoid distraction.

distress.en: The lost child was in great distress.
distress.zh: 那個走失的孩子非常難過。

disturbance.en: The loud party caused a disturbance.
disturbance.zh: 那場吵鬧的派對造成了騷亂。

diversify.zh: 這座農場讓作物更多樣化。

diversion.en: A diversion sent traffic onto another road.
diversion.zh: 改道讓車流轉到另一條路。

divert.en: They diverted the river to stop the flood.
divert.zh: 他們把河水改道以阻止洪水。

doom.en: The dark sky filled them with a sense of doom.
doom.zh: 陰暗的天空讓他們有種不祥的預感。

dormitory-dorm.en: She lives in a college dormitory.

downward.en: There was a downward trend in prices.

downward-downwards.en: The path slopes downwards to the river.
downward-downwards.zh: 這條路向下傾斜通往河邊。

doze.en: He dozed off during the boring lecture.
doze.zh: 他在無聊的講課中打起瞌睡。

drastic.en: They made drastic changes to the plan.
drastic.zh: 他們對計畫做了大幅度的改變。

draught.en: She wrote a rough draught of the letter.

dresser.en: Her clothes are folded in the dresser.
dresser.zh: 她的衣服摺好放在五斗櫃裡。

dressing.en: The nurse changed the dressing on his wound.
dressing.zh: 護士幫他換了傷口的敷料。

dual.en: The car has a dual control system.
dual.zh: 這輛車有雙重控制系統。

dubious.en: I am dubious about his story.
dubious.zh: 我對他的故事感到懷疑。

duration.en: The duration of the movie is two hours.
duration.zh: 這部電影的長度是兩小時。

dusk.en: The birds returned to their nests at dusk.
dusk.zh: 鳥兒在黃昏時返回鳥巢。

dwarf.en: The story is about a kind dwarf.
dwarf.zh: 這個故事是關於一個善良的小矮人。

dwell.en: Wild animals dwell in the forest.
dwell.zh: 野生動物棲息在森林裡。

dwelling.en: Their dwelling was a small wooden hut.
dwelling.zh: 他們的住所是一間小木屋。

eccentric.en: The eccentric artist wore odd clothes.
eccentric.zh: 這位古怪的藝術家穿著奇特的衣服。

eclipse.en: We watched the solar eclipse safely.
eclipse.zh: 我們安全地觀看了日蝕。

edible.zh: 不是所有的菇類都能食用。

editorial.en: The newspaper printed an editorial on the issue.
editorial.zh: 報紙刊登了一篇關於這個議題的社論。

emigrant.en: The emigrant left his country for a new life.
emigrant.zh: 這位移民離開祖國去尋求新生活。

emigration.en: Emigration rose during the hard times.
emigration.zh: 艱困時期移居外國的人增加了。

encyclopedia.en: She looked it up in the encyclopedia.
encyclopedia.zh: 她在百科全書裡查了這個。

endeavor.en: He made every endeavor to win.

endowment.en: The school received a large endowment.
endowment.zh: 這所學校收到了一筆龐大的捐贈。

enhance.en: Spices enhance the flavor of the dish.
enhance.zh: 香料能提升這道菜的風味。

enlighten.en: The book enlightened me about history.
enlighten.zh: 這本書讓我對歷史有了啟發。

enroll.en: She enrolled in a cooking class.

equate.zh: 別把金錢和幸福劃上等號。

escort.en: A guard escorted the guests to the hall.
escort.zh: 一名警衛護送客人到大廳。

esteem.en: She is held in high esteem by her peers.

eternity.en: The boring meeting felt like an eternity.
eternity.zh: 那場無聊的會議感覺像永遠那麼長。

evacuate.en: They evacuated the building during the fire.
evacuate.zh: 火災時他們撤離了大樓。

evoke.zh: 這首歌喚起了快樂的回憶。

examinee.en: Each examinee was given two hours.

examiner.en: The examiner checked the answers carefully.
examiner.zh: 主考官仔細地檢查答案。

excel.en: She excels at math and science.
excel.zh: 她在數學和科學方面很傑出。

excerpt.en: He read an excerpt from the novel.
excerpt.zh: 他讀了那本小說的一段摘錄。

excess.en: Excess salt is bad for your health.
excess.zh: 過量的鹽對你的健康不好。

exclusion.en: Her exclusion from the team upset her.
exclusion.zh: 被排除在隊伍之外讓她難過。

exempt.en: Children are exempt from the fee.

exert.en: He exerted all his strength to push the rock.
exert.zh: 他使盡全力推那塊石頭。

expenditure.zh: 他們減少了每月的支出。

expiration.en: Check the expiration date on the milk.

expire.en: My passport will expire next month.

eyelash-lash.en: An eyelash fell into her eye.
eyelash-lash.zh: 一根睫毛掉進了她的眼睛。

eyelid.en: His eyelids grew heavy with sleep.
eyelid.zh: 他的眼皮因睏意而沉重。

eyesight.en: Reading in dim light harms your eyesight.
eyesight.zh: 在昏暗的燈光下閱讀有害視力。

fable.en: The fable teaches a lesson about honesty.
fable.zh: 這則寓言教導了一個關於誠實的道理。

faction.en: The group split into two factions.

fahrenheit.zh: 水在華氏三十二度結冰。

falter.en: Her voice faltered as she spoke.
falter.zh: 她說話時聲音變得猶豫。

familiarity.en: Her familiarity with the city helped us.
familiarity.zh: 她對這座城市的熟悉幫了我們。

fascination.en: He has a fascination with space.

feasible.en: Is it feasible to finish by Friday?
feasible.zh: 在星期五前完成可行嗎？

feeble.en: The old dog was weak and feeble.
feeble.zh: 那隻老狗又虛弱又無力。
